Package org.assertj.core.api

Class CharSequenceAssert

java.lang.Object
org.assertj.core.api.AbstractAssert<SELF,ACTUAL>
org.assertj.core.api.AbstractCharSequenceAssert<CharSequenceAssert,CharSequence>
org.assertj.core.api.CharSequenceAssert
All Implemented Interfaces:
Assert<CharSequenceAssert,CharSequence>, Descriptable<CharSequenceAssert>, EnumerableAssert<CharSequenceAssert,Character>, ExtensionPoints<CharSequenceAssert,CharSequence>
public class CharSequenceAssert extends AbstractCharSequenceAssert<CharSequenceAssert,CharSequence>
Assertion methods for CharSequences.

To create a new instance of this class, invoke Assertions.assertThat(CharSequence).

Author:
Mikhail Mazursky
